message:
test(http): add comprehensive unit test suite for HTTP client module

Add 612 lines of unit tests covering the full HTTP client surface:

- Method enum: GET/POST string representation
- Header parsing: find_headers_end, find_crlf, find_double_crlf with
  present/absent/edge-case inputs
- Response head parsing: status codes (100-503), multiple headers,
  header values containing colons (URLs), whitespace trimming, and
  error cases (invalid/missing status, empty input)
- Body kind detection: Content-Length (including zero → Empty),
  chunked transfer encoding (including mixed encodings), chunked
  overriding Content-Length per HTTP spec, case-insensitive header
  matching, invalid Content-Length fallback to EOF
- Request building: GET/POST with headers and body, custom headers
  (Authorization, X-Custom), empty path normalization to "/"
- Recorded request construction: empty body, JSON body parsing,
  text body fallback, invalid JSON fallback to text, header
  preservation, case-insensitive Content-Type detection
- Buffer data structure: new/empty/with-data, partial/full consume,
  auto-compaction when pos >= len/2, extend with overflow protection
  (MAX_BUFFERED_BYTES), split_to_vec, consume-then-extend sequences
- Client builder: default construction, VCR recorder attachment
- RequestBuilder: header chaining, JSON serialization with auto
  Content-Type, raw body, timeout configuration
- Response: status/headers accessors, text() concatenation from
  multiple chunks, empty stream, bytes_stream iteration, error
  propagation through stream, content-length responses

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
